title: Result - Australia
content:
Welcome to Australia, the world’s smallest continent and the sixth-largest country!
With stunning geography, from mountains and deserts to tropical forests, vibrant cities and over 23,000 kilometres of coastline, Australia offers endless adventures.

## Unique food tradition
Vegemite: a yeast spread with a rich umami (savoury) flavour.
The Australian economy is well developed and among the largest in the world, focusing on IT, finance and tourism. Australia also has strong mining, manufacturing and agriculture industries.

### Local legend or myth
The Rainbow Serpent: an immortal creator god in Indigenous mythology, depicted as both a snake and a rainbow, is a prominent symbol of life, creation and fertility in Indigenous Australian art.

### Language of the Land
English is the national language but Australians speak around 300 different languages, including many Indigenous languages.
of the world’s coral reef ecosystems are found in Australia’s Great Barrier Reef, making it one of the most renowned and intricate natural systems on the planet.
